generated_files.probe: existing WPHX-312.60 processResponse oracle/candidate probe expanded to include the WPHX-312.61 chunkTransferDecode case

claims: The WPHX PHP emitter now generates a grouped original-path public PHP shell for neighboring WP_Http parser helpers.
The generated class-wp-http.php includes WP_Http::processResponse and WP_Http::chunkTransferDecode in one compiler-emitted class.
The generated shell passes PHP lint and the existing oracle/candidate behavior probes for both helper cases.
The WPHX PHP emission manifest records class:WP_Http and no unsupported constructs for the grouped driver.
non_claims: This does not claim whole-file WP_Http ownership.
processHeaders, buildCookieHeader, protected parse_url, Requests transport behavior, installed WordPress behavior, and live transfer-encoding negotiation remain future gates.
The full WP_Http::request method remains deliberately later.
